title: GPTCraft
description: The whole Minecraft language file ran through GPT2
body:
# GPTCraft

This Resource pack is a modified version of the `en_en` language file in Minecraft.
I created this by running the whole language file through my script.


## For this to work set your language to "English (US)"!

Here are some funny things to start:

- Sweet dreams Advancement
- Throw an anvil Advancement
- Hold the dragon egg, Advancement
- Fast travel advancement
- Acacia fence gate
- Acacia trapdoor
- Sleep in a bed title Advancement
- Key bindings
